name: vibra
description: The new community manager hire for professional WhatsApp communities. Weekly digests, unanswered-question follow-ups, retention dashboards, stakeholder reports — all locally, no API keys.

default_output_dir.title: Default output directory
default_output_dir.description: Where Vibra writes artifacts (JSON, HTML, markdown). Can be overridden per-command with --output-dir.

default_lang.title: Default output language
default_lang.description: Force a language for rendered artifacts (en, es, pt, fr, …). Leave blank to auto-detect from the community's messages.
